document.docAuthor: Zhou, Ya-Dong, Mwachala, Geoffrey, Hu, Guang-Wan & Wang, Qing-Feng
document.masterDocTitle: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

subSubSection.paragraph: Habitat: LMWF, BZ; up to 3 000 m. Distribution: II.
Voucher: North slope of Mount Kenya, Alt. 2 072 m, 2 Feb. 1933, Rogers 388 (EA).

treatment.paragraph: • Phytotaxa 546 (1) © 2022 Magnolia Press ZHOU ET AL.

subSubSection.paragraph: References: Fries & Fries (1927b), Bussmann (1993, 1994), Bussmann & Beck (1995a), Verdcourt (1963), Agnew (2013).
